question: How do you pass outputs between components in a Vertex AI pipeline?
answer: Define typed artifact inputs and outputs
explanation: Vertex AI Pipelines uses Kubeflow Pipelines SDK where components declare typed artifacts (Dataset, Model, Metrics) as inputs/outputs. Cloud Storage paths work but bypass type tracking. Environment variables don't handle artifacts. In-memory stores don't persist across distributed steps.

options.text: Write to Cloud Storage and pass the path
Define typed artifact inputs and outputs
Share an in-memory object store between steps
